mano_cua.result_summary: DateTimePicker组件日历导航行为正常。选择April 15后，使用左右Chevron箭头切换月份（March↔April），通过月份下拉切换到June，通过年份下拉切换到2024，所有导航操作后底部显示的已选日期始终保持'April 15th, 2026 00:00:00'不变。月份/年份导航仅更新日历视图显示，未触发日期选择变更回调，符合预期
mano_cua.last_reasoning: DateTimePicker component calendar navigation works correctly. After selecting April 15, chevron arrows (March↔April), month dropdown (→June), and year dropdown (→2024) all only update the calendar view without changing the selected date 'April 15th, 2026 00:00:00'. Navigation does not trigger date selection change callback. Behavior matches expected result.
